document_structure.tone: Formal third-person service agreement. Enumerates prenatal, labor, and postpartum deliverables with clear non-medical scope boundaries.
document_structure.payment_pattern: Total package fee stated upfront; fractional deposit at signing (non-refundable); balance before estimated due date; accepted payment methods listed; cesarean and provider-unavailability clauses.

style_reference.executive_summary: This Birth Doula Services Agreement is entered into between The Nesting Place, LLC ("TNP") and the Client named below. TNP agrees to provide non-medical emotional, physical, and educational doula support through pregnancy, labor, birth, and immediate postpartum as described herein. The doula does not perform clinical tasks or replace the Client's obstetric care team.

recommended_services.name: Prenatal support
recommended_services.description: One to two prenatal meetings with client and partner to review birth preferences, concerns, and expectations; reasonable phone and email availability throughout pregnancy.

recommended_services.name: Labor and birth support
recommended_services.description: Phone/text guidance when labor begins; in-person support once contractions are consistent. Continuous presence through labor and birth, including induction coordination and backup doula after prolonged labor if needed.
recommended_services.frequency: On call from 2 weeks before through 2 weeks after EDD

recommended_services.name: Immediate postpartum support
recommended_services.description: Approximately two hours after birth for comfort and breastfeeding initiation if desired; follow-up visit within two weeks.

style_reference.timeline: On-call window begins two weeks before estimated due date and ends two weeks after. Agreement valid for 24 hours from issuance to secure doula availability.
style_reference.pricing: Total package fee: $2,500–$2,800. One-third (1/3) deposit due upon signing (non-refundable). Remaining balance due before estimated due date (non-refundable). Payment accepted via Zelle, Venmo, Cash App, cash, or card (3% processing fee on Venmo/card).
style_reference.terms: Doula support is non-medical and does not replace care from physicians, midwives, or nurses. No refunds for cesarean births. Fees refunded only if TNP cannot provide support and no qualified backup doula is available. Client agrees to maintain open communication with the care team and to contact the assigned doula when labor begins.
style_reference.next_steps: Review agreement, sign within 24 hours, submit deposit, and confirm estimated due date and assigned doula. Contact doula when labor begins; use text only 10pm–6am unless urgent or in active labor.

title: Birth doula services agreement (virtual agreement format)

document_structure.tone: Formal agreement with virtual-signature header; emphasizes scope-of-practice boundaries and third-party authorization for TNP care coordination.
document_structure.payment_pattern: Stated total fee; non-refundable deposit at signing; balance before due date.

style_reference.executive_summary: This Virtual Birth Doula Services Agreement is between The Nesting Place, LLC and the Client. TNP will provide birth doula services as outlined below under the virtual agreement format. Client authorizes TNP to coordinate with members of the care team as needed to deliver non-medical support.

recommended_services.name: Prenatal education and planning
recommended_services.description: Prenatal meetings and ongoing communication to prepare for labor, including preference review and expectation setting.

recommended_services.name: Labor support
recommended_services.description: Remote guidance until in-person support is appropriate; continuous support once active labor support begins.

style_reference.timeline: On-call window matches standard birth doula agreements (two weeks before through two weeks after estimated due date). Virtual agreement revision noted in contract header.
style_reference.pricing: Total fee: approximately $2,300. Non-refundable deposit due at signing; remaining balance due before estimated due date.
style_reference.terms: Services are educational and emotional in nature and do not constitute medical advice. Client authorizes information sharing among TNP team members and healthcare providers solely for care coordination. Virtual execution does not alter scope of doula practice or liability limitations.
style_reference.next_steps: Sign virtual agreement promptly, authorize TNP collaboration with care team as outlined, and establish labor communication preferences.

title: The Nesting Place Postpartum Doula Contract (intensive overnight)

document_structure.document_title: The Nesting Place Postpartum Doula Contract
document_structure.tone: TNP standard postpartum doula contract with bullet sections, firm schedule commitment, Carrot Fertility timing, and signature block.
document_structure.payment_pattern: Total package fee; 50% deposit at signing (non-refundable); 50% after first service week; Zelle/Venmo/Cash App; 3% card/Venmo fee; 24-hour offer validity.

style_reference.executive_summary: Standard TNP postpartum doula contract for an intensive overnight package. Client agrees to schedule commitment and communication expectations.

recommended_services.name: Postpartum care package
recommended_services.description: You will be receiving [TOTAL_HOURS] hours of postpartum care with [ASSIGNED_DOULA]. Care outlined as follows: [SHIFT_SCHEDULE]. All dates/times to be agreed upon between client and doula.

recommended_services.name: Carrot Fertility
recommended_services.description: All hours must be used within 6 weeks of discharge date when Carrot Fertility benefits apply.

style_reference.timeline: Following the birth of your baby, please contact us to schedule your 1st postpartum session. Note we will do our best, but support isn't guaranteed with less than 48-hour notice. We will make every effort to provide you with the same doula(s) if at all possible. In special circumstances (with a scheduled surgical birth) you have the option of scheduling your 1st postpartum appointment or shorter length at the hospital (if allowed by hospital).
style_reference.pricing:
The fee for doula support described above is [TOTAL_FEE] due as follows:
[DEPOSIT_AMOUNT] due upon signing and returning the contract (non-refundable).
[BALANCE_AMOUNT] due after the first week of service (non-refundable).
style_reference.terms:
Both parties must agree to and feel comfortable with this contract. By signing below, you agree to the service fees described above and in return, we commit to providing the said services.

By signing below, it is understood that TNP is not held responsible or liable for any unexpected or undesirable outcome. If a disagreement does occur, both parties agree to resolve the challenges amicably.
style_reference.next_steps: This offer is valid for 24 hours. After which time we will do our best, but cannot guarantee doula availability. If you wish to enter into this agreement please sign and return it with the required fee by the close of business day tomorrow.

document_structure.document_title: POSTPARTUM DOULA SERVICES AGREEMENT — OVERNIGHT PACKAGE
document_structure.tone: Structured overnight postpartum agreement with defined shift hours, schedule commitment, and benefit timing language.
document_structure.payment_pattern: Package total; 50% at signing; 50% after first week; non-refundable; amended agreement for additional hours.

style_reference.executive_summary: This Postpartum Doula Services Agreement is between The Nesting Place, LLC and the Client for overnight newborn care support. TNP will provide non-medical postpartum doula services on the schedule below. Services are not on-call before estimated due date unless otherwise agreed in writing.

recommended_services.name: Overnight newborn care shifts
recommended_services.description: 10-hour night shifts on an agreed weekly schedule (example: 3 nights per week for 4 weeks, 120 total hours).

recommended_services.name: Daytime postpartum support
recommended_services.description: Minimum 4-hour day sessions when scheduled; feeding, soothing, light household support, and emotional adjustment support.

style_reference.timeline: Services begin on or after estimated due date or hospital discharge. Carrot Fertility benefits must be completed within six weeks of discharge when applicable.
style_reference.pricing: Total package fee: approximately $9,600. Fifty percent (50%) due at signing (non-refundable). Fifty percent (50%) due after first week of service (non-refundable). Additional hours require amended agreement. Holiday premiums may apply.
style_reference.terms: Minimum 10-hour overnight sessions and 4-hour daytime sessions when scheduled. Doula support is non-medical. Client agrees to honor confirmed schedule, disclose household illness promptly, and maintain a safe work environment. Carrot Fertility hours must be used within six weeks of discharge when applicable.
style_reference.next_steps: Notify TNP after birth, honor confirmed schedule, disclose household illness promptly, and return signed agreement with payment within 24-hour offer window when possible.
